name: Mission Control
short_desc: Self-hosted command center for AI agent fleets
description: Mission Control is a self-hosted command center for AI agent fleets. Create agents, dispatch tasks over Kanban boards, and watch them ship — with live terminal sessions, a knowledge vault, budgets and cost tracking, and support for multiple runtimes (Claude Code, vLLM, LM Studio, OpenAI-compatible APIs). A first-run wizard walks you through creating the admin account and connecting an LLM provider.
author: argyelan-ai
